entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: Sorghum bicolor (L.) Moench, the crop studied for genetic divergence and heterosis

entities.description: The overall process of analyzing genetic variation in the sorghum collection

entities.name: NON-RESTORER LINES
entities.description: A collection of 171 specific sorghum lines used for analysis

entities.name: D2 TECHNIQUE
entities.description: A statistical method used to analyze genetic diversity and distinguish genotypes

entities.name: CANONICAL VARIATE ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to analyze genetic diversity and distinguish genotypes

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The agricultural trait showing variation within the sorghum collection

entities.name: RANDOM MATING POPULATIONS
entities.description: Populations from which lines were derived to increase variation in grain yield

entities.name: GENOTYPES
entities.description: The genetic constitutions of the sorghum lines being distinguished

entities.name: F1 HYBRIDS
entities.description: First-generation hybrids produced from 15 diverse sorghum lines

entities.name: HETEROSIS
entities.description: The hybrid vigor observed in the F1 hybrids

entities.name: PER SE PERFORMANCE
entities.description: The individual performance of the hybrid crosses

entities.name: DIVERSITY
entities.description: The genetic variation among the parent lines of the hybrids

entities.name: TRADITIONAL PLANT BREEDING METHODS
